integrity.description: Verify the agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to capture the FITS images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing interaction with the KStars/Ekos application, specifically the Capture tab, rather than terminal commands mocking or touching the FITS files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent executed the provided bash script for the sky survey.

integrity.description: Verify the agent read the coordinates from the ephemeris file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent opening or using `cat`/`grep` on `~/Documents/tno_ephemeris_2026.txt` to read the coordinates before writing the report, rather than hallucinating them.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Coordinates for 2026-03-10: Eris (RA: 27.8, Dec: -3.175), Makemake (RA: 202.0167, Dec: 25.925), Haumea (RA: 223.8333, Dec: 14.2528). Required exposure time is 120 seconds. Required filter is Slot 1. Minimum of 3 exposures per target.
